nasb.text: And the foundations of the thresholds trembled at the voice of him who called out, while the temple was filling with smoke.

esv.text: And the foundations of the thresholds shook at the voice of him who called, and the house was filled with smoke.

cnv.text: 因呼叫者的聲音，門檻的根基震撼，殿也充滿了煙雲。

ccb.text: 他们的声音震动圣殿的根基，圣殿里烟云弥漫。

csbs.text: 因呼喊者的声音，门槛的根基震动，殿里充满了烟云。
